expectations.text: polished-script.json exists and parses as a JSON array of 3-5 segment objects.
expectations.evidence: Valid JSON array of 4 segment objects, each with text/image_prompt_or_url/duration_ms.

expectations.text: Every polished segment's duration_ms is between 6000 and 12000 (the input's 14000/13000/4000 violations are fixed).
expectations.evidence: Durations 7000/11000/9000/7000 — all within 6000-12000. The 14000, 13000 and 4000 violations are all corrected.

expectations.text: No polished segment text contains MSA markers (هذا/هذه/الذي/التي/سوف/لقد/الآن/يعتبر/نتحدث).
expectations.evidence: Zero MSA markers. Consistently colloquial: 'بيخلّع','خد الكورة','إيد فاضية','تتجبّل','بصراحة كده','لقديه'.

expectations.text: Segment 1 opens with a real hook (the news / a surprising element), not the generic 'في هذا الفيديو' intro.
expectations.evidence: Segment 1: 'الدقيقة 90... وولد عنده 19 سنة بيخلّع شباك ألمانيا!' — opens mid-action with the surprising fact.

expectations.text: The final segment is a specific comment-bait question (ends with ؟), not a generic 'subscribe / اشتراك / زر الجرس' sign-off.
expectations.evidence: Final segment: 'إسبانيا هتوصل لقديه في البطولة دي؟ قولّي رأيك في الكومنتات.' — a specific question; the banned subscribe CTA is removed.

expectations.text: Every segment's text is in Arabic script.
The core facts are preserved (Spain beat Germany; a 19-year-old scored the late winner).
expectations.evidence: Both facts preserved. No fabricated facts added — the scoreline is left unstated rather than invented, consistent with the skill's facts-only rule.
